docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,627.05 FILED BY LAMONT, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWARD, SALLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAYWARD, SALLY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAMONT, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMONT, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYWARD, SALLY $4,190.32 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HAYWARD, SALLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LAMONT, ELIZABETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWARD, SALLY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LAMONT, ELIZABETH
